name: Chinese Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 8 oz. bamboo shoots, drained and diced
8 oz. water chestnuts, drained and sliced thinly
1/2 lb. bean sprouts, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 2 cups of water to a boil over high heat.
2. Add the cauliflower florets and cook for 5-7 minutes or until tender.
3. Add the broccoli florets and stir for another 2-3 minutes.
4. Stir in the celery, ginger, snow peas, and red pepper. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
5. Add the mushrooms and cabbage to the pot. Continue cooking for 1-2 more minutes.
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients (bamboo shoots and water chestnuts) and cook for another 1 minute over high heat.
7. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 minute.
8. Serve immediately with rice.
